# Vanishing RISC-V Benchmark

<!-- Code generated by make bench-vanishing-doc; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Generated by `make bench-vanishing-doc`.

This measures the RISC-V instruction count for the typed vanishing benchmark guest. The proof/system data is embedded as generated Zig constants, so the reported cycle count is focused on `vanishing.verify` and the minimal guest entry/exit path, not proof byte parsing.

## Result

| Metric | Value |
| --- | ---: |
| RISC-V cycles | 262,308 |
| Case index | 1 |
| Case name | `Vanishing/Fibonacci` |
| Modules | 1 |
| Dynamic modules | 0 |
| Rounds | 3 |
| Expressions | 5 |
| Buckets | 1 |
| Vanishings | 1 |
| Witness claims | 3 |
| Quotient claims | 1 |
| Zig release mode | `small` |
| R5 ELF size | 12,864 bytes |
| zkc JSON size | 16,713 bytes |

## Environment

| Tool | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Git commit | `c54f7a417` |
| Zig | `0.16.0` |
| zkc | `mod	github.com/consensys/go-corset	v1.2.18-0.20260521022840-414e7b73971e` |
| zkc main | `bench/riscv_main_bench.zkc` |
| Log | `zig-out/vanishing-bench.log` |

## Reproduce

```bash
cd verifier-ray
make bench-vanishing-doc VANISHING_BENCH_CASE=1 VANISHING_BENCH_RELEASE=small
```
